/services/health-services.title: Health Services | Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services.description: Where to go for free check-ups, vaccines, and medicines, which hospitals are available, and details on health programs in your area.

/services/health-services/get-general-me.title: Get General Medical Consultation and Basic Emergency Care - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/get-general-me.description: Access outpatient consultation, minor emergency care, and medicine guidance from the Allen RHU.

/services/health-services/get-dental-che.title: Get Dental Checkups, Extractions, and Fillings - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/get-dental-che.description: Avail dental assessment, extraction, filling, and gum care services at the RHU dental clinic.

/services/health-services/request-a-medi.description: Apply for RHU-issued medical certificates for fit-to-work, school activities, and official requirements.

/services/health-services/secure-a-sanit.description: Complete sanitation inspections and requirements for business permits, health cards, and related certificates.

/services/health-services/get-free-tb-sc.title: Get Free TB Screening and Treatment (TB-DOTS) - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/get-free-tb-sc.description: Receive TB screening, treatment enrollment, and follow-up monitoring under RHU TB-DOTS services.

/services/health-services/report-notifia.title: Report Notifiable or Vector-Borne Diseases - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/report-notifia.description: Report infectious or vector-borne disease cases and coordinate with RHU for case management and response.

/services/health-services/access-family-.title: Access Family Planning and Reproductive Health Services - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/access-family-.description: Get counseling and family planning method support for couples and individuals of reproductive age.

/services/health-services/access-prenata.title: Access Prenatal and Child Health Services - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/access-prenata.description: Use RHU and barangay health station services for prenatal monitoring and child health support.

/services/health-services/join-nutrition.title: Join Nutrition Counseling and Child Immunization Services - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/join-nutrition.description: Avail nutrition counseling, malnutrition intervention support, and routine child immunization services.

/services/health-services/request-an-eme.title: Request an Emergency Ambulance Transfer - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/request-an-eme.description: Coordinate emergency ambulance transfers for eligible referrals and urgent health cases.

/services/health-services/enroll-in-phil.title: Enroll in PhilHealth YAKAP Outpatient Services - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/enroll-in-phil.description: Get assisted enrollment and outpatient consultation support under the PhilHealth YAKAP program.

/services/health-services/get-schistosom.title: Get Schistosomiasis Treatment and Follow-up Care - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/get-schistosom.description: Receive schistosomiasis consultation, medicine access, counseling, and follow-up services.

/services/health-services/get-leprosy-tr.title: Get Leprosy Treatment and Follow-up Care - Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/get-leprosy-tr.description: Access RHU leprosy treatment, counseling, and scheduled monitoring for recovery and continuity of care.

/services/health-services/get-nutrition-.title: Get Nutrition Assessment and Counseling — Municipality of Allen

/services/health-services/access-nutriti.title: Access Nutrition Program Materials and Resources — Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/access-nutriti.description: Obtain educational materials, supplements, and resources from the Municipal Nutrition Action Office to support your family's nutrition.

/services/health-services/enroll-in-supp.title: Enroll in Supplemental Feeding Programs — Municipality of Allen
/services/health-services/enroll-in-supp.description: Register for community and supplemental feeding programs for malnourished children under five, school children, pregnant women, and lactating mothers.

/services/education.title: Education | Municipality of Allen
/services/education.description: Where to enroll kids in daycare or preschool, how to apply for scholarships, and what education support your LGU offers.

/services/education/access-early-childho.description: Enroll your child in early childhood education programs offered by the municipal government.

/services/business.title: Business and Livelihood | Municipality of Allen

/services/business/secure-a-business-per.title: Secure a Business Permit — Municipality of Allen
/services/business/secure-a-business-per.description: Apply for a new business permit to legally operate your business in Allen.

/services/business/renew-your-business-p.title: Renew Your Business Permit — Municipality of Allen
/services/business/renew-your-business-p.description: Renew your existing business permit to keep your business operation current and compliant.

/services/business/retire-or-close-a-bus.title: Retire or Close a Business Operation — Municipality of Allen
/services/business/retire-or-close-a-bus.description: File for business retirement or closure and obtain the necessary clearances from the Business Permits and Licensing Office.

/services/business/amend-business-inform.title: Amend Business Information and Change Ownership or Location — Municipality of Allen

/services/business/request-a-certified-t.description: Obtain certified copies of your business permit for official use or documentation purposes.

/services/business/secure-an-occupationa.title: Secure an Occupational Permit — Municipality of Allen
/services/business/secure-an-occupationa.description: Apply for an occupational permit for professionals and special trades requiring this license.

/services/social-welfare/get-pre-marriag.title: Get Pre-Marriage Counseling — Municipality of Allen
/services/social-welfare/get-pre-marriag.description: Participate in pre-marriage counseling programs to prepare for married life.

/services/social-welfare/access-welfare-.title: Access Welfare Programs for Socially Disadvantaged Women — Municipality of Allen
/services/social-welfare/access-welfare-.description: Learn about and access welfare and support programs designed for socially disadvantaged women.

/services/social-welfare/get-a-solo-pare.description: Obtain an official solo parent ID to qualify for support programs and government assistance.

/services/social-welfare/access-interven.title: Access Intervention and Diversion Programs for Children in Conflict with the Law — Municipality of Allen
/services/social-welfare/access-interven.description: Access rehabilitation and diversion programs for children in conflict with the law (CICL).

/services/social-welfare/get-care-and-pr.title: Get Care and Protection for Children in Need of Special Assistance — Municipality of Allen
/services/social-welfare/get-care-and-pr.description: Access care and protection services for children who are at risk or need special assistance.

/services/social-welfare/apply-for-finan.title: Apply for Financial Assistance During Crisis Situations — Municipality of Allen
/services/social-welfare/apply-for-finan.description: Receive financial assistance and support if you are facing an individual crisis or emergency.

/services/social-welfare/get-a-certifica.title: Get a Certificate of Indigency or Financial Assessment — Municipality of Allen

/services/social-welfare/request-a-socia.title: Request a Social Case Study Report — Municipality of Allen

/services/social-welfare/get-referral-le.title: Get Referral Letters to Partner Agencies — Municipality of Allen

/services/agriculture-fisheries/access-s.title: Access Support Services from DA, BFAR, and Partner Agencies — Municipality of Allen
/services/agriculture-fisheries/access-s.description: Get referrals and support services from the Department of Agriculture, BFAR, and other partner agencies.

/services/agriculture-fisheries/get-vete.title: Get Veterinary Services for Your Farm Animals — Municipality of Allen
/services/agriculture-fisheries/get-vete.description: Avail of free or subsidized veterinary services for livestock, poultry, and other farm animals.

/services/infrastructure-public-works.title: Infrastructure & Public Works | Municipality of Allen
/services/infrastructure-public-works.description: How to report damaged roads or drainage, where to request water supply, and how to access public facilities and markets.

/services/infrastructure-public-works/ge.description: Apply for an electrical and building permit or occupancy permit for construction and structural projects.

/services/garbage-waste-disposal.description: Garbage collection schedules, waste disposal guidelines, and how to properly dispose of different types of waste.

/services/garbage-waste-disposal/garbage.description: Timely collection of segregated waste for residential, commercial, and institutional properties.

/services/civil-registry/get-a-certified.title: Get a Certified Photocopy or Certification of Registration Documents — Municipality of Allen

/services/tax-revenue/transfer-property-.title: Transfer Property Ownership or Tax Declaration — Municipality of Allen

/services/tax-revenue/request-lot-subdiv.title: Request Lot Subdivision or Consolidation — Municipality of Allen

/services/tax-revenue/apply-for-land-con.title: Apply for Land Conversion — Municipality of Allen

/services/tax-revenue/request-property-r.title: Request Property Reclassification — Municipality of Allen

/services/tax-revenue/get-a-property-cer.title: Get a Property Certification from the Assessor — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/get-an-applicant-re.title: Get an Applicant Referral Letter for Employment — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/get-an-applicant-re.description: Request a referral letter or application for employment from the Public Employment Service Office.

/services/employment/apply-for-company-a.title: Apply for Company Accreditation — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/apply-for-recruitme.title: Apply for Recruitment Activity Approval — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/request-a-job-posti.title: Request a Job Posting — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/get-employment-and-.title: Get Employment and Career Coaching — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/access-dilp-livelih.title: Access DILP Livelihood Assistance — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/get-assistance-from.title: Get Assistance from the OWWA Help Desk — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/submit-a-job-applic.title: Submit a Job Application — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/submit-a-job-applic.description: Submit your job application to the Human Resource Management Office.

/services/employment/submit-documents-or.title: Submit Documents or Correspondence — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/submit-documents-or.description: Submit documents, forms, or correspondence to the Human Resource Management Office.

/services/employment/request-employment-.title: Request Employment Verification — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/request-employment-.description: Request verification of your employment status from the Human Resource Management Office.

/services/employment/apply-for-leave.title: Apply for Leave — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/apply-for-leave.description: Submit a leave application to the Human Resource Management Office.

/services/employment/get-a-certificate-o.title: Get a Certificate of Employment — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/get-a-certificate-o.description: Request a certificate of employment from the Human Resource Management Office.

/services/employment/get-your-service-re.title: Get Your Service Record — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/get-your-service-re.description: Obtain your service record from the Human Resource Management Office.

/services/employment/get-a-contract-of-s.title: Get a Contract of Service or Job Order Contract — Municipality of Allen

/services/employment/get-a-certification.title: Get a Certification of Earned Leave Credits — Municipality of Allen
/services/employment/get-a-certification.description: Request a certification of your earned leave credits from the Human Resource Management Office.

/tourism/beaches-resorts.title: Beaches and Resorts | Municipality of Allen

/tourism/cafes-dining.title: Cafes and Dining | Municipality of Allen

/tourism/hotels-lodging.title: Hotels and Lodging | Municipality of Allen

/tourism/cultural-heritage.title: Cultural and Heritage Sites | Municipality of Allen
/tourism/cultural-heritage.description: Visit historical landmarks and cultural sites that showcase Allen's rich heritage.

/tourism/activities-recreation.title: Activities and Recreation | Municipality of Allen
